message: place that feels hard to enter.
I took a deep breath and reached for the door to go inside.
However, the bar wasn’t open yet.
It’s probably not open at this time.
A gay club I've never been to.
I can’t help but feel a bit nervous.
I took a big deep breath and stepped into the bar.
In front of me stood a beautiful boy.
He was staring at me with his transparent eyes.
The dark interior of the bar was filled with a sweet smell and the smell of sweat.
Hey, will you stay with me until morning tonight?
Or will you just listen to what I have to say and then say goodbye like it's nothing?
Please, okay? Let's be together until morning.
I was swayed by Anju's sad eyes, and before I knew it, I was nodding my head.
Inside the bar, a sweet scent filled the air, making my head feel dizzy.
Just standing here, I feel my butt and groin being stroked.
It might be expected in a place like this, but honestly, it doesn’t feel good.
The condensed dark and sweet lewd world fills this narrow hall.
The person standing in front of me is a cool beauty with androgynous, translucent skin.
Those beautiful eyes seem to see right through me.
I can’t help but doubt if this is really a boy.
You've been staring at me for a while. Do you need something?
Isn't it common sense for the person starting the conversation to introduce themselves?
I don't like fitting into common sense.
I'm called Anju. Nice to meet you.
Usually, when you hear someone's name, you introduce yourself in return, right? But.
am called that. Nice to meet you.
I'm glad. Now I won't be lonely tonight.
You know, I've been feeling lonely lately.
The people who used to care for me have been cold lately. Hey, what do you think is wrong with me?
I don't really know you yet.
Yeah, that's true. But really, I'm very lonely.
Hey Anju, is your boyfriend Tony Ford?
Do you know Tony? Oh, I guess it's obvious since he's famous.
Honestly, I'm going to say this.
Tony is supposed to be my boyfriend, but lately he's been distant and hasn't been seeing me at all.
It feels like a long time ago since I last saw him. It was late at night, after he met with a woman, for sure.
How can you tell he met with a woman?
I knew I had a rival called Ginny. But Tony only has eyes for me.
But that day, Tony came to me and when I took off my jacket,
there was long straight hair stuck to my shirt.
Coming to me after being with a woman,
I felt really bad. But then, I ended up being with him.
If you meet Tony, please tell him I said I wanted to see him.
I didn't know he had such cute boy tastes.
Tony Ford might be a really complex person.
It seems like he definitely came to Anju after meeting Ginny, but when was that?
I'll ask Tony about Anju as a topic.
This boy is so cute, almost like a girl. But if he approaches me, does that mean he likes me?
Yuriko saying Tony is bisexual was not a lie.
But it seems Tony is quite picky.
Looking at him face-to-face, I might forget Anju is a boy. I should quickly ask about Tony before I fall into dangerous paths.
It seems like he isn't a professional gay. His relationship with Tony doesn't seem to be just for money.
